FLAG = "platform_messages"


def add_feature_flag(apps, schema_editor):
    """Add the feature flag.

    Creates the feature flag row in the database.
    Back-fills the feature flag metadata for every customer.
    """
    model = apps.get_model("myapp", "FeatureFlag")
    # create the feature flag row with default off
    model.objects.get_or_create(definition=FLAG, defaults={"value": False})
    # update the rows with the documentation metadata
    model.objects.filter(definition=FLAG).update(**metadata())
